profil.nama: PT Alumindo Light Metal Industry Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Alumindo Light Metal Industry Tbk manufactures and sells flat rolled aluminum products in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers aluminium sheets and coils for ceiling, decorative lighting, curtain walls, venetian blinds, and roofing applications in buildings and constructions industry; use in buses or trucks bodies, license plates, and road signs, as well as various automotive parts comprising heat exchanger/radiator units in transportation industry; and the electrical appliances, such as lamp fitting, covers, and reflectors. It also provides aluminium circles for use in cooking utensils, such as pots and pans; embossed aluminum products primarily for use in roofing, siding, and surface decorations; and aluminum foils for packaging, material wrapping, household foil, heat exchanger fin-stocks, cigarette packaging, pharmaceutical, food packaging, roofing insulation, condensor and fin-stocks as in heat exchanger unit, AirCargoContainer, as well as construction industry, including insulation. PT Alumindo Light Metal Industry Tbk was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
